heroHeadline: BREAKING: Defence Minister Sadio Camara Killed; Kidal Falls to FLA — Largest Junta Losses Since 2012
heroSubtitle: Mali's Defence Minister General Sadio Camara was killed by a JNIM suicide car bomb at his Kati residence on April 25, confirmed April 26. His wife and two grandchildren also died. Africa Corps and FAMa withdrew from Kidal under FLA escort on April 26 — the city declared 'totally' under FLA control — reversing the junta's flagship November 2023 military achievement in under 24 hours. Bamako remains under a 3-day overnight curfew. UN, ECOWAS, AU, and the US have condemned the attacks.
footerNote: Data sourced from ACLED, RFI, Le Monde, Crisis Group, UN OHCHR, HRW, SIPRI, AFP, Bloomberg, Al Jazeera, Reuters, and Institute for Economics & Peace. All figures approximate unless stated.
